# marble.fit

> marble is the offline workout and supplement journal for iOS — designed for the conquerors. Log a set in seconds, hold the streak, and watch your training trends climb. No account, no cloud, no ads.

marble (also known as marble.fit) is a free iPhone app for tracking strength training and supplement intake. It is built for the ones who show up: intentionally minimal, private, and relentless. All data is stored on-device, every feature works fully offline, and it requires no account or sign-up. The brand fuses a monochrome marble palette (white / black / gray) with a terminal/cyberpunk aesthetic — antiquity meets the command line, a tool that treats discipline like code. The tagline is "designed for the conquerors," aimed at a young, ambitious strength-training audience.

## Key facts

- Name: marble (App Store name: marble.fit)
- Platform: iOS only (iPhone)
- Price: Free
- Privacy: 100% on-device storage — no account, no cloud sync, no ads, no personal-data tracking
- Offline: works fully offline
- Category: Health & Fitness — workout tracker, gym log, lifting journal, supplement tracker
- Developer: Lorenzo Quaid Sison

## Features

- Fast logging: capture weight, reps, RPE, and rest in a few taps; repeat your last set with one tap.
- Journal: every set grouped by day, with a ready-to-log card for today.
- Calendar: a month at a glance with training-day markers, streaks, and per-day summaries.
- Split planner: map a weekly plan from Monday to Sunday with planned sets per day, built into the calendar.
- Trends: consistency, weekly volume, momentum, and personal records from the last 7 days out to all-time.
- Supplements: quick-add doses and keep an intake history right next to your training.
- Reminders: custom notifications scheduled on-device so you never miss a session.

The app has four tabs — Journal, Calendar, Supplements, and Trends — and is strictly monochrome with light and dark modes.

## Links

- [Home](https://marble.fit/): the marble marketing site.
- [Download on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/marble-fit/id6757725234): install marble for iPhone (free).
- [Changelog](https://marble.fit/changelog/): latest release notes and updates.
- [Source on GitHub](https://github.com/enzo-prism/marble): the app's public repository.
- [Privacy policy](https://enzo-prism.github.io/marble/privacy): how marble handles data (it stays on-device).

## Frequently asked questions

- Is marble free? Yes — marble is free to download on the App Store.
- Does marble work offline? Yes. Every feature works offline and your data is stored entirely on your device.
- Do I need an account? No. There is no sign-up, login, or cloud sync; you can start logging immediately.
- Which devices are supported? marble is an iOS app for iPhone.
- Does marble show ads or sell my data? No. There are no ads and nothing leaves your device.
- What can I track? Strength-training sets (weight, reps, RPE, rest), weekly splits, streaks, trends, and supplement intake.
